title: AN ACT DECLARING EVERY 21ST DAY OF JUNE AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABARROGUIS, PROVINCE OF QUIRINO, TO BE KNOWN AS "ARAW NG CABARROGUIS"

chunks.text:
H. NO. 23164 / 88 OG No. 17, 2355 (Apr. 27, 1992)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7255, March 20, 1992 ]

AN ACT DECLARING EVERY 21ST DAY OF JUNE AS A SPECIAL NONWORKING HOLIDAY IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABARROGUIS, PROVINCE OF QUIRINO, TO BE KNOWN AS "ARAW NG CABARROGUIS"

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. June 21st of every year is hereby declared as a special nonworking holiday in the Municipality of Cabarroguis, Province of Quirino, to be known as "Araw ng Cabarroguis."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) NEPTALI A. GONZALES

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 4, 1991 and January 23, 1992, respectively.

(Sgd.) ANACLETO D. BADOY, JR.

(Sgd.) CAMILO L. SABIO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: March 20, 1992

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
